raw_caption: The video features a young woman sitting at a table, preparing to enjoy a meal. The camera is positioned at a slightly elevated angle, giving a clear view of the food and her face. The setup is simple, with a focus on the food and her anticipation. The flow of the scene is smooth, with the camera moving in to capture the food from a distance, then zooming in and shaking slightly to highlight its texture and details. The visible physics of the food is captured through the shine of oil and the steam rising from the dish. The peak moment is when she takes a bite, and her face lights up with satisfaction as she savors the flavor. The action of pouring sauce is shown, and the camera captures the thickness of the sauce coating the food. The text on the screen reads "술안주", matching the action of pouring. The highlighted keywords are "The Subject (Fried Chicken), Visual Texture (Golden-crust), The Specific Action (Tearing), and Context/Korean Text (겉바속촉)".
